card.name: UM01 Kadmos, Deft Navigator
card.text: Vigilance Whenever Kadmos or another storied permanent you control enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)

card.name: UM02 Thoughtbreaker Sirens
card.text: Flying Threshold — When Thoughtbreaker Sirens enters, look at the top two cards of your library. Put up to one of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. Then if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, create two 1/1 black Siren creature tokens with flying and "This creature can't block."

card.name: UM03 Blade of Hetos
card.text: Haste Macabre — Whenever Blade of Hetos attacks, put a +1/+1 counter on it if you've sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn.

card.name: UM04 Herald of Revelry
card.text: When Herald of Revelry enters, create a Gold token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") {3}{R}{G}: Until end of turn, target creature gets +2/+2 and must be blocked each combat if able. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: UM05 Karametra's Stag
card.text: Other enchantment creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: UM06 Nyxborn Valiant
card.text: Battalion — Whenever Nyxborn Valiant and at least two other creatures attack, put a +1/+1 counter on target attacking creature. It gains indestructible until end of turn.

card.name: UM07 Siren Sea Pillager
card.text: Whenever Siren Sea Pillager attacks, target creature can't block this turn. Whenever two or more creatures you control deal damage to a player, you may discard a card. if you do, draw two cards.

card.name: UM08 Pharika's Fanatic
card.text: When Pharika's Fanatic enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.") Macabre — At the beginning of your end step, if you've sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, create a 1/1 black Snake creature token with deathtouch.

card.name: UM09 Glory of Iroas
card.text: When Glory of Iroas enters, create a 2/2 white Pegasus creature token with flying. It gains haste until end of turn. Paired creatures you control get +1/+1.

card.name: UM10 Triton Taleweaver
card.text: Whenever the final chapter ability of a Saga you control resolves, create a 2/2 blue Merfolk Knight enchantment creature token.

card.name: UM01 Meletian Starseer
card.text: When Meletian Starseer enters, look at the top four cards of your library, You may reveal a storied card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order. (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)

card.name: UM02 Trapped in the Underworld
card.text: When Trapped in the Underworld enters, mill two cards. (Put the top two cards of your library into your graveyard.) Threshold — At the beginning of your end step, if there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, create a tapped 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: UM03 Snarling Cerberus
card.text: Whenever Snarling Cerberus attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or enchantment. If you do, put a +1/+1 counter on this creature. Until end of turn, it can't be blocked except by three or more creatures.

card.name: UM04 Acropolis Leveler
card.text: Reach, trample Each creature you control that's a Cyclops or Giant has trample.

card.name: UM05 Setessan Vitalists
card.text: When Setessan Vitalists enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: UM06 Monsoon Mutineers
card.text: Whenever another creature you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on Monsoon Mutineers. Each opponent loses 1 life. This ability triggers only once each turn.

card.name: UM07 Stormsight Oracle
card.text: Flying At the beginning of combat on your turn, create a 1/1 red Elemental enchantment creature token. Until end of turn, it gains haste and attacks each combat if able. Sacrifice that token at the beginning of the next end step.

card.name: UM08 Vengeful Phylaskia
card.text: Trample {2}{B}{G}, Exile two other cards from your graveyard: Return Vengeful Phylaskia from your graveyard to the battlefield tapped with a finality counter on it. (If a creature with a finality counter on it would die, exile it instead.)

card.name: UM09 Sun-Blessed Hoplite
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) During your turn, this creature has first strike.

card.name: UM10 Seek Olantin's Ruins
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.) You may put a land card from your hand onto the battlefield. Create a 2/2 blue Merfolk Knight enchantment creature token.

card.name: Theros: Tales of the Callapheia Archetypes CAL
card.text: {W}{U}: Go Wide with Storied {U}{B}: Threshold {B}{R}: Macabre Aggro {R}{G}: Giant + Cyclops Ramp {G}{W}: Enchantment Creature Typal {W}{B}: "Attack with Three Creatures" {U}{R}: Saboteurs {B}{G}: Macabre Slow Grind {R}{W}: Legion Paired Aggro {G}{U}: Sagas Ramp Legion {W}{B}{R} (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) Altar tokens {G}{W}{U} (They're artifacts with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.") Macabre — If you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn... {B}{R}{G} Storied {W}{U} (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.) Sagas (You know what Sagas do)

card.name: Siren CAL
card.text: Flying This token can't block.

card.name: CG10 Green Landcycler
card.text: When Green Landcycler enters, you gain 4 life. Forestcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Forest card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CR09 Chainslinger Cyclops
card.text: {3}{R}: Target creature an opponent controls can't block this turn. Mountaincycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Mountain card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CG06 (Conjured Chimera)
card.text: Macabre — At the beginning of your end step, if you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on (Conjured Chimera) and untap it.

card.name: CG07 Kethaphos Warden
card.text: Trample When Kethaphos Warden enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CG08 Crag Colossus
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature, sacrifice an enchantment, or pay {2}. Vigilance, reach

card.name: CG11 (Seaborne Trial)
card.text: Enchant creature you control When (Seaborne Trial) enters, enchanted creature fights up to one target creature you don't control. Enchanted creature gets +1/+0.

card.name: CG12 Fade into Nyx
card.text: Exile target artifact or enchantment.

card.name: CG13 Strength of Nylea
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 and gains trample until end of turn. If it's an enchantment creature, you gain 2 life.

card.name: CG09 (Colossal Ox)
card.text: Affinity for enchantments (This spell costs {1} less to cast for each enchantment you control.) Whenever an enchantment you control enters, put a +1/+1 counter on (Colossal Ox).

card.name: CG04 Reverent Reveler
card.text: When Reverent Reveler enters, look at the top four cards of your library. You may reveal a creature, land, or Saga card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom of your library in a random order.

card.name: CG05 Oakheart Cultivator
card.text: At the beginning of combat on your turn, target creature gains vigilance and trample until end of turn.

card.name: CG03 Wildwood Fleecemane
card.text: {T}: Add {G}. {T}: Add {G}{G}. Spend this mana only to cast a Cyclops or Giant creature spell.

card.name: CG02 Lurking Basilisk
card.text: Deathtouch {1}, Sacrifice Lurking Basilisk: Exile target noncreature artifact or noncreature enchantment.

card.name: CG01 Repentant Wanderer
card.text: When Repentant Wanderer dies, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CG14 Garden of Karametra
card.text: Enchant land When Garden of Karametra enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.") Enchanted land has "{T}: Add two mana of any one color."

card.name: CG15 Nessian Premonition
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) You gain 3 life. Look at the top three cards of your library. You may reveal a creature or land card from among them and put it into your hand. Put the rest on the bottom in a random order. ​

card.name: CU08 Breaching Ophiotaur
card.text: When Breaching Ophiotaur enters, return up to one other target creature or enchantment to its owner's hand. Islandcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for an Island card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CU03 Floodweaver Triton
card.text: When Floodweaver Triton enters, draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: CU04 Brinecrest Hippocamp
card.text: When Brinecrest Hippocamp enters, tap up to one target creature and put a stun counter on it. (If a permanent with a stun counter would become untapped, remove one from it instead.)

card.name: CU14 Swept by Storm
card.text: Return target nonland permanent to its owner's hand. Threshold — If seven or more cards are in your graveyard, instead that permanent's owner puts it on their choice of the top or bottom of their library.

card.name: CU06 Siren of Sailor's Folly
card.text: Flying When Siren of Sailor's Folly enters, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

card.name: CU05 Odunos Trickster
card.text: Whenever Odunos Trickster deals combat damage to a player or planeswalker, draw a card.

card.name: CU07 Herald of Thassa
card.text: This spell costs {X} less to cast, where X is your devotion to blue. (Each {U} in the mana costs of permanents you control counts toward your devotion to blue.) Ward {2} (Whenever this creature becomes the target of a spell or ability an opponent controls, counter it unless that player pays {2}.)

card.name: CU02 Siren Sea Mariner
card.text: Saga spells you cast cost {1} less to cast.

card.name: CU10 Refute
card.text: Counter target spell. Draw a card, then discard a card.

card.name: CU09 (Protection Spell)
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature you control has base power and toughness 4/4 and gains hexproof. (This permanent can't be the target of spells or abilities your opponents control.)

card.name: CU11 Opt
card.text: Scry 1. Draw a card.

card.name: CU12 Thirst for Meaning
card.text: Draw three cards. Then discard two cards unless you discard an enchantment card.

card.name: CU13 Carcinization
card.text: Enchant creature Enchanted creature loses all abilities and is a blue Crab creature with base power and toughness 0/2.

card.name: CU15 (Blue Common Saga)
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Up to one target creature you control gets +1/+0 and can't be blocked this turn. Draw two cards, then discard a card. ​

card.name: CU01 Nyxborn Strix
card.text: Flying, vigilance Whenever Nyxborn Strix attacks while you control another storied permanent, scry 1. (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)

card.name: CR15 Clobber
card.text: Clobber deals 6 damage to target creature or planeswalker. If you controlled a Giant or Cyclops as you cast this spell, Clobber deals 3 damage to that permanent's controller.

card.name: CR14 Flames of the Underworld
card.text: Macabre — If you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, this spell costs {2} less to cast. Flames of the Underworld deals 4 damage to target creature or planeswalker.

card.name: CR01 Akroan Sellsword
card.text: When Akroan Sellsword dies, it deals 1 damage to each opponent. Create a Gold token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.")

card.name: CR03 Impassioned Recruit
card.text: Haste (This creature can attack and {T} as soon as it comes under your control.)

card.name: CR13 Audience Participation
card.text: Enchant creature When Audience Participation enters, gain control of enchanted creature until end of turn. Untap it. It gains haste until end of turn. Enchanted creature can't block.

card.name: CR04 Eidolon of Victory
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) Menace (This creature can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: CR05 (Reveling Satyr)
card.text: When (Reveling Satyr) enters, choose one — • Create a 1/1 red Satyr creature token with "This creature can't block." • Destroy target artifact.

card.name: CR08 Dakra Isles Tyrant
card.text: Reach Whenever Dakra Isles Tyrant enters or attacks, you may sacrifice another creature or enchantment. When you do, draw a card, then Dakra Isles Tyrant deals 2 damage to each opponent.

card.name: CR07 Iroan Champion
card.text: Trample When Iroan Champion enters, target creature an opponent controls can't block this turn.

card.name: CR06 (Sparkly Manticore)
card.text: During your turn, (Sparkly Manticore) has first strike. Macabre — When (Sparkly Manticore) enters, if you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, (Sparkly Manticore) deals 2 damage to target player or planeswalker.

card.name: CR10 Lightning Strike
card.text: Lightning Strike deals 3 damage to any target.

card.name: CR11 Guided Strike
card.text: Target creature you control and up to one target creature it's paired with each get +1/+0 and gain trample until end of turn.

card.name: CR12 Divine Inspiration
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Exile the top two cards of your library. You may play those cards until the end of your next turn. Create a Gold token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") ​

card.name: CR02 (Legion Card)
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) {1}{R}: This creature gets +2/+0 until end of turn. Activate only once per turn.

card.name: Altar CAL
card.text: {3}, {T}, Sacrifice this artifact: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CB03 Nyxborn Cerberus
card.text: Battalion — Whenever Nyxborn Cerberus and at least two other creatures attack, each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life.

card.name: CB14 kill everything to death
card.text: Destroy target creature, planeswalker, or enchantment.

card.name: CB04 Shipcaller Siren
card.text: Flying {3}, Sacrifice another creature or enchantment: Draw a card.

card.name: CB15 Final Vengeance
card.text: As an additional cost to cast this spell, sacrifice a creature or enchantment. Exile target creature.

card.name: CB05 Confident Sell-Sword
card.text: When Confident Sell-Sword enters, create a Gold token. (It's an artifact with "Sacrifice this token: Add one mana of any color.") Macabre — At the beginning of your end step, if you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, put a +1/+1 counter on Confident Sell-Sword.

card.name: CB12 Bark Dargain
card.text: Look at the top four cards of your library. Put two of them into your hand and the rest into your graveyard. You lose 2 life.

card.name: CB08 Big Evil Returned
card.text: When this creature enters, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: CB13 Unrelease From The Underworld
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) I — Target opponent reveals their hand. You choose a nonland card from it and exile that card. II, III — Each opponent loses 1 life and you gain 1 life. ​

card.name: CB06 Very Evil Satyr
card.text: As long as there are seven or more cards in your graveyard, Very Evil Satyr gets +2/+0 and has menace. (It can't be blocked except by two or more creatures.)

card.name: CB09 Big Catoblepas
card.text: When Big Catoblepas enters, target creature gains deathtouch and indestructible until end of turn. Swampcycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Swamp card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CB11 Released from the Underworld
card.text: Until end of turn, target creature gains lifelink and "When this creature dies, return it to the battlefield tapped under its owner's control."

card.name: CB10 kill you to death
card.text: Target creature gets -2/-2 until end of turn. Macabre — If you sacrificed a nonland permanent this turn, instead it gets -6/-6 until end of turn.

card.name: CB02 Doomed Dissenter
card.text: When Doomed Dissenter dies, create a 2/2 black Zombie creature token.

card.name: CB01 Arasta's Weaver
card.text: Deathtouch

card.name: CB07 Kragma Gorehorn
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) Deathtouch

card.name: CW12 nuke from orbit
card.text: nuke from orbit deals X damage to target creature or planeswalker, where X is the number of permanents you control that are creatures and/or enchantments.

card.name: CW14 Take Up The Aegis
card.text: Target creature gets +2/+2 until end of turn. If it's a storied creature, it also gains lifelink and indestructible until end of turn. (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)

card.name: CW02 Akroan Legionnaire
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) At the beginning of your end step, untap this creature.

card.name: CW07 Even More Trusted Pegasus
card.text: Legion (When this creature attacks, you may pair it with another unpaired attacker until end of turn. Paired creatures gain the following abilities.) Flying

card.name: CW11 Obligatory Plainscycler
card.text: When Obligatory Plainscycler enters, you gain life equal to the number of creatures you control. Plainscycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Search your library for a Plains card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.)

card.name: CW06 the white common saga
card.text: (As this Saga enters and after your draw step, add a lore counter. Sacrifice after III.) Create two 1/1 white Human creature tokens. ngl chat i got no idea on this one. scry? lifegain? ​

card.name: CW05 Therosian Redditors
card.text: Whenever another storied permanent you control enters, tap target creature an opponent controls. (Enchantments and legendary creatures are storied.)

card.name: CW10 Mister Griffin
card.text: Battalion — Whenever Mister Griffin and at least two other creatures attack, Mister Griffin gains flying until end of turn.

card.name: CW09 Different Nyxborn
card.text: When Different Nyxborn enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token. {3}{W}{W}: Creatures you control get +1/+1 until end of turn.

card.name: CW15 Kill Cyclops or Nyxborn
card.text: Choose one — • Exile target creature with power 4 or greater. • Exile target enchantment.

card.name: CW04 Nyxborn
card.text: Whenever another permanent that's a creature and/or enchantment you control enters, you gain 1 life.

card.name: CW08 Solar Worshipper
card.text: Flying When Solar Worshipper enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CW03 Devoted Worshipper
card.text: When Devoted Worshipper enters, create an Altar token. (It's an artifact with "{3}, {T}, Sacrifice this token: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.")

card.name: CW13 High and Dry
card.text: Flash When High and Dry enters, exile up to one target creature or planeswalker until High and Dry leaves the battlefield.

card.name: CW01 Tragic Poet
card.text: {T}, Sacrifice Tragic Poet: Return target enchantment card from your graveyard to your hand.

card.name: CA06 Ominous Pool
card.text: {2}, {T}: Scry 1. (Look at the top card of your library. You may put that card on the bottom of your library.) {6}, {T}, Sacrifice Ominous Pool: Exile target creature or enchantment.

card.name: CA02 Anvilwrought Harrier
card.text: Flying When Anvilwrought Harrier enters, scry 2. (Look at the top two cards of your library, then put any number of them on the bottom and the rest on top in any order.)

card.name: CA03 Olantin Robokraken
card.text: Trample Cycling {2} ({2}, Discard this card: Draw a card.)

card.name: CA04 Champion's Statue
card.text: {T}: Add one mana of any color. {3}, {T}, Sacrifice Champion's Statue: Create a 3/2 Demigod enchantment creature token that's all colors. Activate only as a sorcery.

card.name: CA05 Traveler's Amulet
card.text: {1}, Sacrifice Traveler's Amulet: Search your library for a basic land card, reveal it, put it into your hand, then shuffle.

card.name: CA01 Hoplite's Arsenal
card.text: When Hoplite's Arsenal enters, create a 1/1 white Human creature token and attach Hoplite's Arsenal to it. Equipped creature gets +1/+0. Equip {2} ({2}: Attach to target creature you control. Equip only as a sorcery.)

card.name: Gold CAL
card.text: Sacrifice this artifact: Add one mana of any color.
